name: role-model
description: Stable baseline for the role-model protocol and role-model-router family.

scripts.lint: biome check . && corepack pnpm run lint:rust
scripts.lint:rust: cargo fmt --manifest-path role-model-router/rust/Cargo.toml --all --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path role-model-router/rust/Cargo.toml --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.schemas:validate: corepack pnpm --filter @role-model/schema-tools exec tsx src/validate-schemas.ts validate
scripts.types:generate: corepack pnpm --filter @role-model/schema-tools exec tsx src/validate-schemas.ts generate-types
scripts.runtime:package-sea: corepack pnpm --filter @role-model-router/runtime-ui build && corepack pnpm --filter @role-model-router/runtime-host-bridge... build && corepack pnpm --filter @role-model-router/runtime-host-bridge run package-sea
scripts.runtime:validate-packaging: corepack pnpm run runtime:package-sea && corepack pnpm --filter @role-model-router/runtime-host-bridge run validate-packaging
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run types:generate && corepack pnpm -r --if-present build
scripts.ci:check: corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run schemas:validate && corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm run test && corepack pnpm run test:rust && corepack pnpm run smoke
